text.title: BA Requirements Management Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals (input fields, scores, thresholds) to a conclusion that references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the CR reference an existing requirement?

conclusion.verdict: Halt; do not author the artefact.
BA may approve clarifications without escalation.
PM + BA joint approval; document in register.

example.trace: CR-014 → has_reqid=true → impact=medium → PM+BA joint approval.
